statusPolicy.defeatedRequires: verified persistent ItemLotParam Memory award flag ON
statusPolicy.details: The Memory award ItemLot flag is the authoritative persistent progression signal for each mapped major boss. Inventory and SoulSplitter 930x flags are retained as corroborating evidence. Status proves whether that boss's Memory reward has been awarded in this character save; it is not guaranteed to distinguish the current NG cycle from an earlier cycle.

evidence.source: ItemLotParam row 2001 awards Memory: Gyoubu Oniwa goods ID 5200.
Inventory scan for Memory: Gyoubu Oniwa goods item.
SoulSplitter src/SoulMemory/Sekiro/Boss.cs maps this boss to a boss split enum value, and src/SoulSplitter/Splits/Sekiro/Split.cs plus SekiroSplitter.cs read Boss split values as event flags.
evidence.details: Candidate SoulSplitter 930x boss split flag. Current conclusion: these flags are not reliable persistent boss-completion evidence, so this signal is not promoted to bossDefeatFlag and cannot drive defeated/not_defeated status.

acquisitionMetadata.location: Ashina Outskirts - Ashina Castle Gate Fortress battlefield
acquisitionMetadata.acquisition: Defeat Gyoubu Oniwa at the castle gate battlefield to receive Memory: Gyoubu Oniwa.

unresolved.details: This category covers the 14 major bosses that award Memories. Minibosses and encounters without a unique Memory reward require separate progression flags.

Memory reward flags prove that a boss reward was awarded in the character save. Additional controlled NG+ fixtures are required before claiming that every ON flag belongs to the active playthrough cycle rather than an earlier cycle.
